programme.title: The Top Ten Alien Disasters
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten most devastating disasters ever documented that might have an otherworldly connection, including a flying monster at a nuclear incident.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle's First Blood
programme.desc: The team investigates a large wooden shipwreck that could be one of the Bermuda Triangle area's earliest victims: the long-lost SS D.H. Mount.

programme.title: Endurance
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: Beat The Unbeaten: Conquering The Kachin Dao
programme.desc: Two previous champions battle it out for the chance to compete against one of our titans of the forge: Gladiator of the Forge Jesse Hu, Superchamp Collin Sage, or our Undefeated Judge Ben Abbott.

programme.title: Cypress Clash
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Brick By Brick
programme.desc: In the swamp, the team uncovers a previously unknown structure remarkably resembling a container. And after weeks of chasing the elusive Chappell Vault, the Fellowship hits a void deep in the Money Pit.

programme.title: Beyond The Breakers
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: Escaping Devil's Island
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: The Legend Of The Lost Dutchman's Mine
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Peacekeepers (S1)
programme.desc: This series goes to the heart of the Chinese army as they deploy to a UN peacekeeping mission in South Sudan. Filmed by the soldiers themselves, a 700-strong infantry battalion adapts to life on the base.

programme.desc: Two sneaker companies become industry titans through a decades-long battle, as they unleash iconic footwear that will bring sneakers mainstream and make them part of the fabric of American culture.

programme.title: Easy Money
programme.desc: In the middle of the 20th century, a small piece of plastic revolutionises the world of commerce as Diners' Club, Bank of America, and American Express race to change how people pay for everything.

programme.title: Big Tex
programme.desc: Cruising through the Lone Star State, the Wolfe brothers visit a one-of-a-kind home that was custom-built around a staggering Texas-size collection of pieces.

programme.desc: 本节目讲述关于生存与生活的故事，关注发生在普通人身上的命运起落，聆听来自城市边缘的呼吸。

programme.title: 文化大观园
programme.desc: 节目关注中华文化中的大事件、大历史、大人物和新发现，在纷繁的生活中给您清静、雅致的空间，并通过我们的镜头去探寻中华文明中充满迷幻、离奇的人物和故事。

programme.title: 我们和它们
programme.desc: 以纪实拍摄手法，从人与动物、自然和谐相处的角度，讲述跨物种的感人故事，见证人与动物之间源于爱、超越爱的情感。

programme.title: 我们和它们

programme.title: 凤凰正点播报 (10/5/26)
programme.desc: 每天从零点到零点，《凤凰正点播报》为您循环不息地追踪全球各个角落、各个领域最有价值、新鲜热辣的新闻大事。第一时间让您知道天下事的最新发展。

programme.title: 石评天下
programme.desc: 《石评天下》是一档深度政治评论性的周播专题节目。节目透过三个环：「石观世界」、「齐论古今」及「平说新语」 ，由资深评论员石齐平以独特的观点。

programme.title: 皇牌大放送

programme.title: 凤凰焦点新闻 (10/5/26)

programme.title: 凤凰大健康

programme.title: 时事直通车 (10/5/26)

programme.desc: The 19th edition of the Indian Premier League once again bring together leading international and domestic cricketers in India’s premier T20 competition. The tournament will feature 10 teams competing in 74 matches.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: Snafu
programme.desc: As 20-Squad scrambles to track down a cold-blooded sniper terrorizing Los Angeles, Hondo discovers a link to his own South L.A. neighborhood that brings a personal twist to the hunt for the deadly shooter.

programme.title: Mystery In Miami
programme.desc: Three best friends set out to track down the missing fourth member of their squad... in 1980s Miami.

programme.title: Rex, Drugs & Rock N' Roll
programme.desc: When Jesse's music teacher is killed at his recording studio, Charlie and Rex link the crime to a seemingly unrelated murder.

programme.title: Felicia
programme.desc: Simone and Carter get trapped in the tropics while hunting down a suspect on the run.

programme.title: The Reaper
programme.desc: When Simone and Carter go undercover to find an international assassin known as The Reaper, a prisoner seeking bail recognizes Carter and nearly blows his cover.

programme.title: Mission Creep
programme.desc: BRAVO's back together and sent on a mission to verify concerning intel that links China's drug trafficking to a potential coup in Honduras.

programme.title: Appetite For Destruction
programme.desc: BRAVO finally finds some fentanyl, officially linking Nazario to the smuggling operation.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Stranger In A Game
programme.desc: Tess is in over her head when she agrees to mentor a newly blind teenager for Mia while investigating a killer-or killers - using untraceable 3D printed ghost guns. Blood and killers? Sure. Moody teenagers? Hell no. As Tess and Sunny realize this is the work of two murderers working together despite not knowing each other, Sunny celebrates small wins as her therapist has taught her.

programme.title: Ol' Man Liver
programme.desc: Elsbeth battles a wealthy biohacker (Hamish Linklater) who will do anything to stay young, including an extreme diet, vigorous exercise ... and murder.

programme.title: The Bandit
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Orientation
programme.desc: Driving Katie to orientation, Amy and Michael stop at a trail and find a gravely injured man. With no signal, saving him is up to them.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: In Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire, the Spengler family returns to where it all started - the iconic New York City firehouse - to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who've developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an army of ghosts that casts a death chill upon the city, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: National Finals 4 (Part 1)
programme.desc: The National Finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining ninjas compete in Stage 3 and 4 and a $1 million winner is crowned as the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.desc: Elsbeth battles a wealthy biohacker (Hamish Linklater) who will do anything to stay young, including an extreme diet, vigorous exercise ... and murder.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: After the shocking shooting of a member of 20-Squad, Hondo and the team launch a citywide manhunt for the robbery crew responsible. Meanwhile, Deacon's plans for his future hit a snag, and Powell and Alfaro clash over a tricky issue.

programme.title: PL Preview 2025/26
programme.desc: We look ahead to Liverpool v Chelsea at Anfield, Arsenal’s trip to West Ham and Manchester City hosting Brentford.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 11 league games (W8 D3), collecting more points (24) and conceding fewer goals (8) than any other side during that run.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.desc: Following victories against Burnley and Aston Villa, Fulham are looking to win three consecutive home league games for the first time since December 2023.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees (13 in 9) is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United’s star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it’s not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he’s faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Spurs ended a 15-game winless run against Wolves last time out (1-0) and could record successive victories in the Premier League for the first time since their opening two matches of this season against Burnley (3-0) and Manchester City (2-0).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Defeat for Wolves in this match would mean they’ve lost against all other 19 Premier League clubs this season. It would be just the second time a team has lost to every side they’ve faced in a campaign, after Sheffield United in 2023-24.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: The Saturday Wrap 2025/26
programme.desc: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20 (W8 D10). They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014.

programme.title: Movie - Satham Podaathay
programme.desc: Bhanu tries to save her marriage although her husband Ratnavel is impotent. Their marriage ends anyway and Bhanu marries again. But a vengeful Ratnavel kidnaps her and holds her hostage in his house.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA MEMANG BIKIN GILA
programme.desc: Luna’s life crumbles when her boyfriend, Ariel, flees with all her money and jewelry. Left with nothing but his massive debts, Luna faces the threat of losing her home while trying to pick up the pieces of her broken heart

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.desc: While hiking, Erika (Soraya Rasyid) gets separated from her group and lost in the wilderness. She is rescued by Rohmad (Masaji Wijayanto), the new guardian of a sacred waterfall in a traditional village, who must protect both the water and his unexpected guest.

programme.title: WORLD-CLASS K-DOL
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show, K-pop idols play games and complete various missions and challenges, experiencing global cultures and connecting with fans around the world.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Immortal Songs 2
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. She doesn't trust him much at first, but as time passes by, she accepts him as family. This new father is always on her side. He loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.desc: Your killer bestie is back! Armed with wild upgrades and her same iconic attitude, M3GAN faces off against an android who threatens her beloved Cady.

programme.title: All The Devils Are Here
programme.desc: After a heist, four criminals lay low in a remote safehouse. As paranoia builds, one thing becomes clear: the real threat is already inside.

programme.title: Freediver
programme.desc: Freediving champion Alexey Molchanov sets out on a daring mission to break five world records.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad (Tim Robinson) struggles to keep his job and marriage afloat while relentlessly pursuing a friendship with his charming new neighbor, Brian (Paul Rudd).

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: "The Wild Robot" follows Rozzum 7134, a futuristic robot that washes ashore on a deserted island.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this sixth chapter of the horror franchise, a new family moves into Katie and Kristi’s former house and discovers an evil presence that begins to terrorise their lives.

programme.title: Armor
programme.desc: Armored truck security guard James and his son are transporting millions of dollars when a team of thieves takeover their truck to seize the money.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: A villain’s plans to steal the moon are foiled when he encounters the immense will of three little orphaned girls who look at him as a potential Dad.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Ben Richards must outwit the Network in this fun, unhinged deadly game show where his unexpected fandom threatens to dismantle the entire system.

programme.title: M3gan 2.0
programme.desc: Your killer bestie is back! Armed with wild upgrades and her same iconic attitude, M3GAN faces off against an android who threatens her beloved Cady.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A rising star quarterback suffers a potentially career-ending brain trauma after an attack by an unhinged fan.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: With the 70s behind him, San Diego's top rated newsman, Ron Burgundy, returns to take New York's first 24-hour news channel by storm.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: Alto Knights follows two of New York's most notorious organized crime bosses, Frank Costello and Vito Genovese, and how their separate paths to power place them on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: "The Wild Robot" follows Rozzum 7134, a futuristic robot that washes ashore on a deserted island.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must face two hugely epic, but different threats: one supernatural and the other a little closer to home.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Xxx: Return Of Xander Cage
programme.desc: When a group of lethal mercenaries steal a weapon that pose a global threat, superspy Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of adrenaline junkies to save the day.

programme.title: Civil War
programme.desc: In a dystopian future America, a team of military-embedded journalists races against time to reach Washington, D.C., before rebel factions descend upon the White House.

programme.title: Splitsville
programme.desc: Carey seeks support after divorce, but learns Julie and Paul's secret: an open marriage. Crossing the line throws all their lives into turmoil.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A rising star quarterback suffers a potentially career-ending brain trauma after an attack by an unhinged fan.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful executive suffers a crisis of confidence and his career is at stake, he finds the solution to his problems in his daughter’s imaginary world.

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: In a small town, Vidya cares for Minnie, a girl with paralysis. When Minnie is kidnapped, Vidya attempts a rescue but suffers an accident, landing in hospital while Minnie's fate hangs in danger. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sujoy Ghosh

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: While holidaying in Goa with her family, a shy Muskaan falls for Dino, a dancer at the resort. Problems ensue when her father objects to their relationship as he believes Dino has impregnated a woman. Release Year: 2006 Director: Pooja Bhatt

programme.title: F.A.L.T.U.
programme.desc: Four struggling friends fake a university to escape failure, but their risky lie grows out of control, forcing them to rely on friendship and quick thinking to survive the chaos.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Mom

programme.title: Dhaakad
programme.desc: Agent Agni, despite her doubts, accepts the mission to capture Rudraveer, a dangerous trafficker. But the pursuit soon leads her into unexpected and perilous paths. Release Year: 2022 Director: Razneesh Ghai

programme.title: Raid (2023)
programme.desc: An honest income-tax officer raids a corrupt politician's mansion, uncovering hidden wealth and facing intense pressure and danger while standing firm for truth and justice.

programme.title: Chennai V/S China
programme.desc: Dong Lee arrives to start a biological war, but a student revives ancient Bodhidharma powers through genetics to stop him and save humanity.

programme.title: Chakravyuh
programme.desc: Kabir infiltrates a Naxal group on Adil's orders but begins to empathize with them, creating a painful conflict between duty, friendship, and his shaken beliefs. Release Year: 2012 Director: Prakash Jha

programme.title: Dhaakad
programme.desc: Agent Agni, despite her doubts, accepts the mission to capture Rudraveer, a dangerous trafficker. But the pursuit soon leads her into unexpected and perilous paths. Release Year: 2022 Director: Razneesh Ghai

programme.title: Raid (2023)
programme.desc: An honest income-tax officer raids a corrupt politician's mansion, uncovering hidden wealth and facing intense pressure and danger while standing firm for truth and justice.

programme.title: Apna Sapna Money Money
programme.desc: Satyabol blocks Shivani's love for Christian Arjun, who seeks help from clever cousin Kishan to win over her father and unite with the woman he adores. Release Year: 2006 Director: Sangeeth Sivan

programme.title: Attack: Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Bob Biswas
programme.desc: Bob Biswas, an insurance agent, is released from hospital after eight years in a coma and is welcomed by his wife Mary and son Benny. He has lost his memory and does not remember the past. Release Year: 2021 Director: Diya Annapurna Ghosh

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: While holidaying in Goa with her family, a shy Muskaan falls for Dino, a dancer at the resort. Problems ensue when her father objects to their relationship as he believes Dino has impregnated a woman. Release Year: 2006 Director: Pooja Bhatt

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Lelepati Adalah Komunikasi Cinta Yang Hakiki
programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Tiara. It is said that Tiara did not study seriously while in college. This made Tiara's parents angry, so she was sent to her grandmother's village to take care of catfish. Tiara, who had to adapt to the new environment in the village, also had to respect Jaya, who often annoyed her. Even Jaya also received support from Tiara's grandmother. So why did Tiara suddenly start to like Jaya?

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜因七海蕊的死而伤心，并向彧修明表示想要辞官。彧修明拒绝后，叶凌霜晕倒，被诊断出被人诅咒。彧修明为了救她，奋力找到并杀死了施咒的秘术师。之后，叶凌霜从端木彦口中得知了他参与诅咒的真相。同时，叶凌霜为了购置冰玦而将她的琥珀石送给翼无忧，但翼无忧并未变卖它，而是用自己的钱购买了冰玦。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成的儿子柯睿晖替明塱慈善基金表演筹款，永成发现后到场要拉走睿晖，导致睿晖惊恐症发作，幸得启心助他平伏。永成要启澄、建邦加入明塱医疗城专案小组，为他争取好处。启澄、建邦找秀琳出面，以主席选票作交换，让一妍答应两人加入专案小组。杏芳提到明塱将实行加工时减福利的优化计划，英杰不满并提出质疑。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】宇泽被一妍勒令停职，丽雪以董事会主席的投票作交换，希望一妍帮助宇泽。明塱医院实行优化计划，结果引发职员罢工抗议！工潮期间，董事袁添维的大哥心脏病入院、丽雪招待基金会重要捐款人到访、启心的男友亦谦苏醒等重要大事接连出现。一妍怀疑有黑手于背后推动工潮，而黑手竟是以珈与德桥，以珈还凭此事令杏芳答应在选董事会主席时投其一票。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈对策动工潮酿成不幸，十分后悔。方欣以董事会代表身分负责彻查，一妍了然方欣目的是阻止她竞逐明塱主席。以珈终发现海淳患上家族性遗传病，懊悔自己为了选主席，忽略了海淳。一妍答应与以珈一起照顾海淳。海淳的生母曾筱蕙回港探望海淳，原来是以珈安排让海淳圆愿。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: ONEflight Myrtle Beach Classic Round 3
programme.desc: The Myrtle Beach Classic, a PGA Tour event sponsored by Visit Myrtle Beach, debuted in 2024 is the first PGA Tour event in Myrtle Beach history, and is the first major professional golf tournament to the Grand Strand in 24 years. It is played at the Dunes Golf and Beach Club in the Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. The event will feature a purse of $3.9 million with 300 FedExCup points awarded to the champion.

programme.title: Mizuho Americas Open Round 3
programme.desc: The Mizuho Americas Open is a women's professional golf tournament on the LPGA Tour held at Liberty National Golf Club in Jersey City, New Jersey. It is a fairly new tournament on the LPGA Tour with the inaugural event making its debut back in June 2023. It has a prize fund of $3 million, among the highest on tour for a non-major event.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Ep 19 Goldman Sachs' Lloyd Blanfein
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Ep 104 Billionaire Barry Diller
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America’s top CEOs, CNBC’s Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies.

programme.title: Ep 976 Rakuten
programme.desc: CNBC’s longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: Ep 2 Le Castellet (fra)
programme.desc: With six 4-hour races on Europe’s most technical and demanding circuits, the ELMS is the perfect proving ground for any competitor wishing to take on the challenge of the next stage on the endurance ladder, the FIA World Endurance Championship, and the pinnacle of the sport, the 24 Hours of Le Mans.

programme.title: Ep 2 Le Castellet (fra)
programme.desc: Over the years, the Michelin Le Mans Cup has become the main series for amateur drivers looking for an introduction to Endurance racing. Launched in 2016, the competition takes place on some of Europe’s most iconic circuits. The MLMC is the first step into the world of endurance racing for the young stars of tomorrow.

programme.title: Valentino Rossi - The Man And The Racer
programme.desc: An extraordinary personality, global popularity, legendary victory celebrations, and nine motorcycle world championship titles - those are the words to describe Valentino Rossi. Since hanging up his leathers in 2021, Valé, if we may him call him that, has embarked on a career in car racing, and this is where our story begins.

programme.title: Ep 1796 Nathan Lane / Noah Kahan
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶凌霜因七海蕊的死而伤心，并向彧修明表示想要辞官。彧修明拒绝后，叶凌霜晕倒，被诊断出被人诅咒。彧修明为了救她，奋力找到并杀死了施咒的秘术师。之后，叶凌霜从端木彦口中得知了他参与诅咒的真相。同时，叶凌霜为了购置冰玦而将她的琥珀石送给翼无忧，但翼无忧并未变卖它，而是用自己的钱购买了冰玦。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成的儿子柯睿晖替明塱慈善基金表演筹款，永成发现后到场要拉走睿晖，导致睿晖惊恐症发作，幸得启心助他平伏。永成要启澄、建邦加入明塱医疗城专案小组，为他争取好处。启澄、建邦找秀琳出面，以主席选票作交换，让一妍答应两人加入专案小组。杏芳提到明塱将实行加工时减福利的优化计划，英杰不满并提出质疑。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】宇泽被一妍勒令停职，丽雪以董事会主席的投票作交换，希望一妍帮助宇泽。明塱医院实行优化计划，结果引发职员罢工抗议！工潮期间，董事袁添维的大哥心脏病入院、丽雪招待基金会重要捐款人到访、启心的男友亦谦苏醒等重要大事接连出现。一妍怀疑有黑手于背后推动工潮，而黑手竟是以珈与德桥，以珈还凭此事令杏芳答应在选董事会主席时投其一票。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈对策动工潮酿成不幸，十分后悔。方欣以董事会代表身分负责彻查，一妍了然方欣目的是阻止她竞逐明塱主席。以珈终发现海淳患上家族性遗传病，懊悔自己为了选主席，忽略了海淳。一妍答应与以珈一起照顾海淳。海淳的生母曾筱蕙回港探望海淳，原来是以珈安排让海淳圆愿。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】志明主动调至心胸肺外科，跟随一妍。启澄发现建邦投资失利，更反对他计划向永成投诚以借钱还债。启澄被迫站在方欣阵营，加入工潮调查小组。方欣领导小组调查工潮起因，矛头直指一妍，指她滥权包庇宇泽……思敬忽然病情恶化，但因经历过无数手术，他已失去求生意志，希望一妍「放手」……

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初

programme.title: Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris
programme.desc: The Schneider Electric Marathon de Paris is one of the world's largest and most popular road races, featuring over 50,000 participants from 110 countries. The race course starts on the Champs-Élysées and finishes near Avenue Foch.

programme.title: UCI Europe Tour - CIC Tour de la Provence H/Ls
programme.desc: The Tour de la Provence is an annual early-season professional road cycling stage race held in the Provence region of southern France. The race is historically connected to the local French newspaper La Provence.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: Internazionali BNL d’Italia (1000) Day 3 Session 1
programme.desc: The Italian Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually at the Foro Italico in Rome, Italy. Since its inception in 1930, the Italian Open has become one of the most prestigious clay-court tournaments in the world.

programme.title: Day 13 Afternoon Session: SF 1
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.title: UCI Asia Tour - Tour of Hainan Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: Copa Colsanitas Colsubsidio (250) Final

programme.title: Spiritual Explorers
programme.desc: Japan lies in a volcanic zone and boasts over 3000 onsen - we visit two old hot springs to learn the significance of bathing to the Japanese spirit.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Experience the colours of Amami Oshima in beautiful time-lapse footage. Unique hues include "Amami Blue" ocean waters and the glossy black of silk thread that's painstakingly dyed using wood and mud.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Somewhere Street A Short Stroll
programme.desc: A close-up look at cities worldwide as seen by a walking tourist - viewers visit places off the beaten path, meet ordinary people, and enjoy a travel experience that's only possible on foot.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Designing for portability. The spotlight is on portable and mobile designs. From lighting to houses and transport, explore the appeal and potential of designing for portability.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: All About the Beans

programme.title: 凌晨两点半2
programme.desc: 依成和朋友到聚魂灵山探险，传说山中埋着千年女尸，千年不灭之阴火，进去的人都逃不出来。凌晨两点半，依成的朋友先后突然消失。在森林搜索期间，依成进入无限轮回的灵异空间，更恐怖的事情却接踵而来...

programme.title: 天官赐福
programme.desc: 康熙少年嗣位，太后急欲替他完婚，遂选纳大臣之女纳兰琼瑶为妃，但琼瑶为争取婚姻自由离家出走，康熙亦乐得不用成婚。后来康熙微服下江南，却偶遇女扮男装的琼瑶...

programme.title: 夜迷藏
programme.desc: 电影由三个恐怖短故事组成：一个男人收到死神通报后，设法避过死亡；男人因心爱的妻子去世后伤心欲绝，他的妻子变成鬼魂与他通灵；三兄弟在一次晚餐聚会上为照顾年迈母亲的问题而争吵，最后竟变成一宗可怕的谋杀案。

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: 怪谈
programme.desc: 在迷雾村，为人养子的文杰反复梦见同一个噩梦。为了解开身世之谜，他卷入连串神秘的失踪案件中。随着更多村民相继离奇死去，村民更深信不疑千年来的井龙王诅咒。于是，文杰与保安队长联手探寻真相，揭开反派阴谋，最终拯救被危害的无辜村民.

programme.title: 女人心
programme.desc: 有妇之夫孙子威与莉发展婚外情，其妻宝儿忍无可忍，决定离婚。分居后，宝儿认识一群独身但不甘寂寞的女人，经常聚会，各自各精彩！子威后来发觉自己最爱的依然是宝儿，二人决定复合。怎料在庆祝复合的晚会上，二人经过一场争吵，竟宣布第二度离异...

programme.title: 神勇双妹唛
programme.desc: 故事描述一对表姐妹梁山伯与祝英台乃斗气冤家，两女为争夺神秘俊男阿山欢心，却惹来大圈杀手威吓逼害，更陷入一场宝物争夺战。两女身陷险境，惟有摒弃前嫌，联手反抗......

programme.title: 倒数回击
programme.desc: 天才拳击手徐佳阳为了替父亲还赌债在地下酒馆打黑拳时被举报，痛失奥运资格赛，陨落拳坛。十年后，铁血教练陈丽月决要助她实现父亲的遗愿，重回拳坛找回昔日的自己。当拳击的热血碰上责任时，曾经失落的拳击梦能否再度燃烧？

programme.title: 七小福
programme.desc: 本片是改编自京剧大师于占元师傅的真实故事。六十年代戏剧文化日渐衰落，但于师傅仍坚持要保留他的戏剧学院。三个少年决意入读于师傅的戏剧研究学院，向他拜师学艺，经过艰辛的训练过程后，于师傅终于成功造就香港影坛这三大巨星。

programme.title: 军火大劫案
programme.desc: 特工阿文被安排潜伏于东南亚的军火商旗下，寻找其手中的一批军火炸药并将其销毁。当他终于找到该批军火后，却遭到不明匪徒袭击。为防止灾难发生，阿文决定与他的特工搭档阿琼合力夺回军火。

programme.title: 霹雳先锋
programme.desc: 张铁柱是一名出色的警长，他刚烈的办案风格却遭到上司和同僚的不满。当他意外发现偷车贼伟仔为追捕持枪劫匪的关键人物，两人不得不携手将罪犯绳之以法。

programme.title: 男与女
programme.desc: 偷渡客孟思晨匿居于山边木屋区，沦为众男工具，期间结识非法拳师江远生，并发生雾水情缘。后来思晨下嫁中年木匠贵叔，生活虽安稳，心灵却空虚。意外再遇远生后，难免干柴烈火，未几更有孕...

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 最佳女婿
programme.desc: 新潮发型屋少东 Happy 哥与死党赖布甸、龙眼仔, 因抢走上海理发店板大松客人, 与他发生口角. 一夜, 三人胡涂地与松女儿阿英醉宿一宵, 之后英意外怀孕, 不知是谁才是经手人, 惟有待孩子出世后, 以血型辨别亲父, 怎料三人皆属同一血型...

programme.title: 荒岛尸变
programme.desc: 一向酷爱钻研丧尸的Jeff，为追求刺激与朋友们勇闯一个荒废多年的神秘小岛。初时众人以为是个普通探险之旅，但冒险之旅却顿变为惊栗的旅程。直到他们被困荒岛，遇到丧尸的袭击，毫无还击之力之余，面对死亡的边缘，游戏才正式揭开序幕。

programme.title: 白蛇传说
programme.desc: 这部奇幻动作片改编自中国经典传说《白蛇传》，讲述郎中许仙爱上化身为女子的千年白蛇。白蛇的真实身份被揭露后，高僧法海为守护人类与超自然力量之间的平衡，不得不挺身而出，展开一场惊心动魄的对决。

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 秦明·生死语者
programme.desc: 被誉为"尸语者"的法医秦明常可在尸体身上解剖出重要的线索。在调查一宗谋杀案时，秦明在实习助手和刑警队长的协助下发现了尘封16年的雪山杀人案，同时亦揭发离奇谋杀案背后隐藏着的秘密。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 降龙大师：魔龙咒
programme.desc: 龙王被降龙大师封印了五百年，龙王之女为解除父亲的封印，不惜穿越时空，回到五百年前杀掉降龙大师。但她没想到五百年前的龙王与降龙大师竟是生死挚友...

programme.title: 僵尸家族
programme.desc: 一群盗墓的考古学家意外发现一个保存完好的僵尸家族，计画将他们贩卖至黑市牟利。岂料在运送途中，不慎撕下封印僵尸的纸符，让沉睡的亡灵苏醒逃窜。然而，当地中医师林正英挺身而出，誓要将它们彻底剿灭。

programme.title: 百变星君
programme.desc: 富家子李泽星挂名留学，实际上却挥金如土，并自命情圣，称霸校园。一日，因搭上黑帮老大情妇Silvia，而遭黑帮刺杀，被炸得粉身碎骨。这个财大气粗的李泽星以百变金刚之姿态复活，还掌握了独特的能力，得到一份真正的工作，还有他真心爱上的意中人。

programme.title: 盲战
programme.desc: 前特警队长东谷在任务中罹患永久性失明，之后更被胁迫要承担任务失败的责任。幸好东谷在女儿的陪伴下逐渐走出阴霾，并开始适应黑暗的世界。可是曾经的宿敌再度出现，令女儿陷入危险之中。东谷为救女儿，展开了一场生死盲战。

programme.title: 审死官
programme.desc: 周星驰饰演著名状师宋世杰，经常不择手段为富人打赢官司，让他们逍遥法外，因此妻子迫使他退隐乡间。然而，当宋夫人结识一位丈夫之死被贪官掩盖的妇人时，宋世杰决定挺身而出，再次在公堂上伸张正义，为她讨回公道。

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 望夫成龙
programme.desc: 在乡间长大的情侣石金水和吴带娣青梅竹马，但娣父反对他们在一起，于是二人搬到市区共同生活。带娣为助金水找到一份推销员工作，暗中当舞小姐为其筹款。金水因工作勤奋，受上司赏识，加以提拔。虽然工作发展如意，但金水渐渐发觉自己与带娣的距离越来越远...

programme.title: 玻璃樽
programme.desc: 台湾女孩阿不前往香港，寻找漂流玻璃樽中那封浪漫纸条的作者阿拔。谁料现实阿拔与幻想的相差甚远，让她心碎失望、决定黯然返乡。就在命运的转角，她遇上富豪企业家陈子午，就此展开一段意想不到的爱情故事。

programme.title: 种鬼
programme.desc: 故事描述，计程车司机周通(高飞饰)之妻艾莲(玄智慧饰)红杏出墙，搭上赌场常客方明(徐少强饰)。一日，艾与方争执后独自离去，却被流氓挟往荒屋施暴，艾极力反抗，终堕楼惨死。周受一股神秘力量引导，发现艾尸首，蒙眬间，闻鬼语遣其往找巫师设法报仇。自始怪事接连发生，所有与艾之死有关的人均遭鬼怪缠扰...

programme.title: 一代宗师
programme.desc: 这部史诗式动作电影是由著名电影人王家卫执导。故事始于佛山，当时年迈的北方功夫宗师宫羽田公开挑战南方宗师叶问。叶问最终胜出，但后来输给宫羽田的女儿宫二，二人却因此结下情缘...

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Pups Save a Snowboard Competition / Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea
programme.desc: Jake and Everest are excited for the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. // When the PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell, they meet a giant Sea Slug!

programme.title: Pups Save a Pizza / Pups Save Skye
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are delivering pizza dough for a big party when the van spins out of control. Pups to the rescue! // Skye is on her way to Jake's Mountain when she crash lands in the snow. Ryder calls Everest to save the day!

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: Tres Leches Trouble / Wizzle Wozzle Woo
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.title: Blazing Amazing Stories
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are babysitting for Baby Gherkin! When it's time for her nap, they tell her three epic bedtime stories about police, cowboys, and superheroes - all starring Blaze and his friends!

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: Video Game Land A Monster Machine Super Special Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to VIDEO GAME LAND! When Blaze and Crusher get zapped into a magic arcade machine, they must beat four epic levels to win the game and return back home. Are they up for the challenge? Or will this adventure end in a GAME OVER?!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Show
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: Pups Save a Flamingo Dancer / Pups Save a Mayor and Her Mini
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol searches for Julia, Julius and a flamingo when they go missing from a dance contest. // The Paw Patrol comes to the rescue when Mayor Goodway and her niece Julia get stuck on a runaway art installation.

programme.title: Pups Save the Wind Trekkers / Pups Save a Trophy
programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the Paw Patrol and a little snake to rescue them. // When Humdinger's mom Helga loses her son's phony trophy, the Paw Patrol have to rescue her and the trophy.

programme.title: A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Tio Tesoro's Treasure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Map help Tio Tesoro find his treasure trackers and become a treasure map again.

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: Mr Dinosaur is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: Best Friend
programme.desc: Peppa Pig's best friend, Suzy Sheep, comes over to visit.

programme.title: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr Labrador has an ice cream van but runs out of ice cream. Granny Pig suggests Peppa and George make their own ice cream with the help of Mr Labrador.

programme.title: Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: The Mountain Eater / The First Day Of School
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Blaze and the Magic Genie
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are driving through the desert when they meet a magical Genie who loves to grant wishes! But when the Genie loses the jewels that give him his powers, Blaze and AJ go on a quest to get them back!

programme.title: The Midnight Mile
programme.desc: It may be nighttime in Axle City, but all the trucks are staying up super late for the ultimate all-night race: the Midnight Mile! And the first truck to cross the finish line will win the Glow-in-the-Dark trophy!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrely Whirly
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: Pups Save Jake's Cake / Pups Save a Wild Ride
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups need to help get a surprise birthday ice cream cake up to Jake's cabin. // Alex and Daring Danny X are snowboarding right for Risky Ridge and need help from the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: Pups Save Bedtime / Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle. They tried to call the Paw Patrol, but their phone cut out! // Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it's rolled away and is heading through town. The Paw Patrol has to catch it before it breaks.

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Roadtrip / Tickets / Talent Show
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: Rainbow's Lost Colors / Boots' Rubber Band Ball
programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: School Bus Trip
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.title: Rebecca Rabbit
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. It is a bit different to Peppa's house; it is inside a hill, with tunnels instead of stairs. They enjoy playing rabbits and everyone is surprised when George discovers he likes carrots!

programme.title: The baby Piggy
programme.desc: Peppa and George are visiting their big cousin Chloe and her new baby brother, Alexander. Baby Alexander is too little to play games, but Peppa and Chloe have a great idea;

programme.title: Nature Trail
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are driving out to the countryside to go for a walk in the woods. Peppa and George discover trails of footprints left by little birds and ants.

programme.title: Pretend Friend
programme.desc: Suzy Sheep has made up a pretend friend called "Leo Lion". Peppa cannot see Leo but Suzy says that Leo likes roaring and dressing up. Peppa decides that now she can see Leo. Even Mummy and Daddy Pig play along. But George feels a bit left out.

programme.title: Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: Granny and Granpa's Attic
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but it's hard to decide what to throw out. Amongst the clutter, Peppa finds an old record player and some funny old records.

programme.title: The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.title: Pups Save the Polar Bears / A Pup in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: Pups Save The Hiding Elephants
programme.desc: Elephants become trapped in the Monkey Temple after a bee frightens them away from their watering hole.

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Ice Cream Shop / The Crew Fixes A Squeak
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Solar Farm
programme.desc: When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: The Tenderest Bond of All
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: Storm
programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins.

programme.title: Dragon Island Duel
programme.desc: It's the day of the Dragon Island Duel, a race around tropical Dragon Island! But when Crusher cheats and sends Blaze away before the race, AJ must set out to rescue his best friend and bring him back to the starting line.

programme.title: Pups Save the Sea Turtles / Pups and the Very Big Baby
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach! // There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: Pups Save an Ostrich
programme.desc: The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home. The PAW Patrol must find and lead it to the Wingnuts' ranch.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: Dora's Mermaid Adventure / Mermazing Surprise
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show / Pups Save an Eagle
programme.desc: When a big pop star comes to town, a storm blows the whole town apart, including the stage! Can the PAW Patrol save the day? // While out in the woods, the pups rescue an eagle caught in twine and tied to her own nest!

programme.title: Pups Find a Genie / Pups Save a Tightrope Walker
programme.desc: Rubble finds an old brass Jack in the Box, with a genie inside who grants him three wishes! // Francois Turbot is bravely walking a tightrope, but seagulls threaten to ruin his act. Time to call the PAW Patrol!

programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.
