programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: Big Rig Blaze
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Monster Machine Rescue Team
programme.desc: Blaze must complete three amazing rescues to join the greatest emergency vehicle team in Axle City: the Monster Machine Rescue Team!

programme.title: Tire Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and his pals are gearing up for a big race with brand new tires! But when Crusher tricks Starla, Darington and Stripes into putting on out-of-control SILLY tires, it's up to Blaze to rescue them and beat Crusher to the finish line!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends / Pups Save a Puffy Mayor
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble. // During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after a puffy shirt floats away with them.

programme.title: Pups Save a Jukebox / Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long. Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records. // A hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry sending her careening down Jake's Mountain

programme.title: Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: The Great Key Mystery
programme.desc: Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: Beach Scanner
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tidy
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Daddy Loses his Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: Gardening
programme.desc: Peppa and George enjoy helping Grandpa Pig plant seeds in his garden.

programme.title: Hiccups
programme.desc: George gets hiccups when he drinks his juice too quickly, so Peppa tries to cure him.

programme.title: Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: Polly Parrot
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house, and meet their new parrot, Polly.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Peppa and George decide to play a game of hide and seek.

programme.title: The Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mummy Pig at Work
programme.desc: Peppa accidentally crashes Mummy Pig's computer, so Daddy Pig tries to fix it.

programme.title: Piggy in the Middle
programme.desc: Peppa teaches George how to catch a ball, and later, they play Monkey in the Middle with Mummy Pig.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Lucky Croc / Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: AJ to the Rescue
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are racing through the jungle when Blaze gets trapped in super sticky mud! Now it's up to AJ and his new animal friends, to go on an epic adventure to save Blaze!

programme.title: The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Kangaroo Safari / The Crew Plays In The Construction Games
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a kangaroo safari for Lucas and Lily right in the Bark Yard... until their construction kangaroo hops away! // Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save the Flying Food / Pups Save a Ferris Wheel
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's delivery drones have gone out of control, and now they are air-dropping food everywhere! // Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

programme.title: Pups Save a Manatee / Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp. // Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porter's and Breakfast!

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.desc: Ale the Alebrije asks Dora for her help! The Alebrije tree is wilting, so it's up to Dora to find its rainbow water. // On a super hot day, everyone wants paleta, but Val's paleta truck is stuck! Dora goes to rescue her and get paletas for everyone.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled - and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: Captain Daddy Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.title: The Quarrel
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are having a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. As time goes by they really miss each other but they still refuse to make up.

programme.title: Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: The Powercut
programme.desc: One day all the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is plunged into darkness. There has been a power cut. While they wait for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.

programme.title: Daddy Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday, but he has to go to work. While he is away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.

programme.title: Deep Sea Grand Prix

programme.desc: When all the tires on the Adventure Bay school bus blow out, Ryder volunteers to use the Paw Patroller as a substitute school bus. // When the famous singing songbirds of Adventure Bay go missing, it's PAW Patrol to the rescue!

programme.desc: When Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling, he ends up trapped in a canyon. The Paw Patrol has to hurry to save him.

programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat for a day on the river. Daddy Pig is the captain, Peppa, George and Mummy Pig are the crew. When the boat gets stuck in some long reeds. Daddy Pig has to use all his strength to push the boat free.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: Runaway Rocket
programme.desc: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue the two trucks before their runaway rocket crashes into the garbage dump.

programme.title: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe / Pups Save a Train
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes? // Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: Pups Save Big Paw
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Volleybull! / Diferente es Excelente
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny perfect a new move in time for the championship volleyball game! // Dora and Boots run into Dulce the dragon on her way to the first day of school and show her that everyone's differences are what make them excellent!

programme.title: Hole In 10
programme.desc: While mini-golfing, Ben is attacked by the Ground Hawgs, a gang of Dr. Animo mutants turned bikers. Ben must turn alien to stop them before they set their sights on the city down the road.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny's signature characters.

programme.title: The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: The Bruised Bluenana
programme.desc: Panini tricks Chowder into nursing an injured bluenana.

programme.title: Shnitzel & The Lead Farfel
programme.desc: Shnitzel trains to revive his muscles and lift the heaviest object around.

programme.title: The Thousand Pound Cake
programme.desc: Chowder and Shnitzel race against time when delivering a heavy order to a giant before it's freed.

programme.title: The Rat Sandwich
programme.desc: The gang tries to get rid of Reuben, who is extorting the company.

programme.title: Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs.

programme.title: Study Buddies
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: The Cure
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: Ben 24hrs
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen attempt to stay up all night for Adrenaland but Ben fails to utilise his alien powers to stay awake and starts causing disaster after disaster.

programme.title: Freaky Gwen Ben
programme.desc: Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the Titan Gloves at a flea market and accidentally switches bodies with Gwen, forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

programme.title: Rustbucket Rip
programme.desc: During a tour of historic Oldeville, Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card. When Billy Billions claims the same card, Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

programme.title: The Clocktopus
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: During a stop at the superstore Shoppe, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her day care.

programme.title: Villain Time
programme.desc: Ben must turn alien to save the Hoover Dam from disaster, but when tough guy hero Tim Buktu swoops in to 'help', Ben must figure out if Tim is friend or foe.

programme.title: Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: Don't Let The Bass Drop
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen are excited to attend an Earth Day EDM concert in Portland until the show is hijacked by the sound-manipulating baddy, Lord Decibel, who uses sound as a weapon to trash the planet.

programme.title: Cutting Corners
programme.desc: Ben approaches Geezer Bob about doing a little yard work to earn spending money and accidentally draws the ire of Bob's gnome-neighbours: the tiny, terrifyingly tenacious Billy-Bob Goblins.

programme.title: Animo Farm
programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.title: Riding The Storm Out
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: Need For Speed
programme.desc: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast and furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park. But with Old Faithful's help, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

programme.title: Brief Career Of Lucky Girl
programme.desc: When a wizard cosplayer gets his hands on a real, magical wand at Comic Con, Ben enlists Gwen to help stop Hex from retrieving it.

programme.title: Waterfilter
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.title: Shhh!
programme.desc: While relaxing at a monastery with a no-noise policy, Ben can't keep quiet and accidentally awakens a dangerous dragon hidden in a secret chamber below the hallowed halls.

programme.title: Bright Lights, Black Hearts
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers. Before long, Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire.

programme.title: Adventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max meet a family that appears to be a mirror image of them, but when Max goes off on a hike with their matriarch, Maxine, Ben is forced to babysit the bratty Simon Sez.

programme.title: Steam Is The Word
programme.desc: In the heart of Silicon Valley, Ben has to stop Victorian villain, Steam Smythe, from securing an epic power source sealed in a Tesla time capsule.

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: During Chefapalooza in the Rocky Mountains, three famous chefs and infamous bad-guys, The Tri-Chefta, hunt down Wildvine in hopes of creating their most exotic dish to date.

programme.title: All Wet
programme.desc: No one believes Ben when he insists that one of the other patrons, waiting in line at the World of Wet Water Park, is the nefarious Frightwig, disguised as a common girl.

programme.title: Story, Bored
programme.desc: During a book signing at a medieval castle, Ben must stop Hex from getting his hands on a grimoire that can fuse its user with mythical beasts, creating monstrous hybrids!

programme.title: Xingo
programme.desc: Ben is interested in a marathon of his favourite cartoon show, 'Spazz', but when Ben goes Upgrade to get a better signal, the titular Spazz leaps from his animated dimension, bringing chaos with him!

programme.title: Drive You Crazy
programme.desc: After the Rust Bucket breaks down at a Mobile Home Park, Ben discovers they've stumbled on to the last leg of the Cali 10 Hundred, an epic, off-road auto race.

programme.title: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When the Rust Bucket runs out of gas on a foggy, East Coast road, Ben, Gwen and Max are forced to stay at a hotel being menaced by Creepy Carl - a local folklore expert, who may actually be a ghost!

programme.title: Hole In 10
programme.desc: While mini-golfing, Ben is attacked by the Ground Hawgs, a gang of Dr. Animo mutants turned bikers. Ben must turn alien to stop them before they set their sights on the city down the road.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: This star-packed extravaganza brings the comic book legend to the big screen where an infant superhero is sent to Earth just as his home planet, Krypton, explodes.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical 'lands' to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: A hot-headed baseball coach finds his work cut out when he takes upon a new coaching assignment with a team that is way below par.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: I Wish She Would Trust Me
programme.desc: A wish about trust causes a serious trust issue between Daniel and Ruby, too. Meanwhile, Daniel learns secrets about his dad that he never knew.

programme.title: I Wish I Got The Credit I Deserve
programme.desc: Daniel struggles to understand his daughter's new vocation. Ruby embarks on a scientific wish that helps bring them both to a meeting of the minds.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Stop Pretending
programme.desc: Ruby helps bring a long-kept secret to light and changes a life. Daniel meets a business developer interested in Emerald whom he tries to win over.

programme.title: I Wish I Had Another Chance
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town's festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: I Wish I Could Find My Family
programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel's in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: You're So Fresh!
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical 'lands' to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox.

programme.title: Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it's a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won't save them from being sent home.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: Stinky Love
programme.desc: Kimchi whisks one of Mung's smelliest dishes away to a romantic setting on top of the catering company.

programme.title: Certifrycation Class
programme.desc: When Mung is forced to spend the day in Chef Certifrycation school, he butts heads with a fickle instructor.

programme.title: Sing Beans
programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.title: Grubble Gum
programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: The Cinnamini Monster
programme.desc: When Chowder discovers a lonely monster in the forest, the whole gang soon has to find a way to escape from their emotionally needy new 'friend'.

programme.title: The Wrong Address
programme.desc: During a seemingly normal delivery, Chowder's gut instincts lead him and Mung on a non-stop adventure.

programme.title: The Wrong Customer
programme.desc: An unexpected outlaw unwittingly turns the catering company into his hideout.

programme.title: Burple Nurples
programme.desc: When Chowder unknowingly fills a dish with poison, Mung must spend the day keeping the tainted food away from the citizens of Marzipan City.

programme.title: Shnitzel Makes A Deposit
programme.desc: Payday is always Shnitzel's favorite day. But it becomes the worst day of his life when he's forced to take Chowder along to the bank.

programme.title: Gazpacho Stands Up
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: A Taste Of Marzipan
programme.desc: When Mung and Ms. Endive unveil the same dish at Marzipan City's biggest food fair, it's an all out war to decide whose is better.

programme.title: The Puckerberry Overlords
programme.desc: When a sour berry sends Chowder on a strange journey into his own mouth, he finds himself on a mission to save his taste buds from some tart invaders.

programme.title: The Elemelons
programme.desc: When Truffles' bad temper causes Mung's fruit creatures to stop making juice, he locks her up with an ultimatum: make friends with them or never get out.

programme.title: Sniffleball
programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: Mung On The Rocks
programme.desc: Truffles gives Mung the cold shoulder after he forgets their 450th wedding anniversary. With Mung too sad to cook, Chowder must take action.

programme.title: The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: The Moldy Touch
programme.desc: Chowder thinks he's finally become helpful when he discovers a secret, magic spice.

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: In order to get a rare fruit from Endive, Mung and Chowder become her servants for the day.

programme.title: Chowder & Mr. Fugu
programme.desc: When Mung's best customer enlists Chowder to be his valet for the day, Chowder soon realizes he's met the one person who can eat more than him.

programme.title: The Vacation
programme.desc: Chowder, Mung and Shnitzel just want to spend a nice day at the beach.

programme.title: The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: The Bruised Bluenana
programme.desc: Panini tricks Chowder into nursing an injured bluenana.

Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won't save them from being sent home.

programme.title: Get Your Phil
programme.desc: Padma gets a real rise out of the chefs when she tasks them to make a Quickfire dish without any All-Purpose flour. Instead chefs must work with alternative flours from Blue Corn and Buckwheat to Coconut and Hazelnut.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny's signature characters.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: Funky Monkey
programme.desc: Li'l D plots to get into the upper class' production.

programme.title: Eddie's Money
programme.desc: Eddie and Li'l D embark on a mystery tour.

programme.title: Brotha From The Third Rock
programme.desc: Phil's efforts to prove aliens exist land him in trouble.

programme.title: Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: Prank Yankers
programme.desc: Tamika's tries to impress two popular older girls.

programme.title: Mini Mentors
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: Too Cool For School
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Nothin' To It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Tamika And The Beast
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs.

programme.title: Study Buddies
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 综艺大热门24

programme.title: 一步一脚印 发现新台湾
programme.desc: 台湾到处有充满创意、认真工作的人们，「一步一脚印，发现新台湾」将呈现出真实而全面的新台湾精神。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 拜托ATM
programme.desc: 极具未来感场景的全新益智综艺节目《拜托ATM》，结合电玩游戏概念，挑战者将透过益智竞争，开启ATM进行终极译码游戏。一场科技与智慧的益智竞赛《拜托ATM》由行长胡瓜、襄理Sandra与精英挑战者携手打造。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 食尚玩家
programme.desc: 美食旅游节目「食尚玩家」带你走遍台湾与世界各地，寻找在地美食，体验最道地的旅游行程。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26 (Data Zone)
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20 (W8 D10). They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United (D6 L24), with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won their last three Premier League games, beating Burnley 4-1, Sunderland 5-0 and Chelsea 3-1. They last scored 3+ goals in four consecutive top-flight games in March/April 1995.
